tagline.id: Satu paket untuk tidur yang lebih berkualitas
tagline.en: One bundle for better quality sleep

description.id: Paket lengkap berisi Bantal dan Guling Memory Foam Luxury. Bantalnya menjaga kesejajaran kepala dan leher, sementara gulingnya menopang tubuh saat tidur menyamping — kombinasi sempurna untuk menghadirkan pengalaman tidur standar hotel mewah di kamar Anda dengan harga lebih hemat.
description.en: A complete bundle of the Luxury Memory Foam Pillow and Bolster. The pillow keeps your head and neck aligned while the bolster supports your body as you sleep on your side — the perfect pairing to bring a luxury-hotel sleep experience to your bedroom at a better price.

id: Isi: 1 Bantal (45 x 65 cm) + 1 Guling (panjang 80 cm, lingkar 60 cm)
en: Includes: 1 Pillow (45 x 65 cm) + 1 Bolster (80 cm long, 60 cm circumference)
